AssertionError: 期望 3, 实际 2
  Path: data[?(@.status=='20')].total
  Operator: ==
  Expected: 3
  Actual: 2
OST_011 | 验证已逾期订单统计
parameters:
{'method': 'GET', 'endpoint': '/hzsx/business/order/countOrderStatus', 'case_id': 'OST_011', 'title': '验证已逾期订单统计', 'description': "状态为已逾期（status='20'）的订单数量", 'params': {'requestSource': 'businessNewOfListHeaderStatus'}, 'sql': {'query': "SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count FROM llxz_order.ct_user_orders o WHERE 1=1
  -- 原有订单基础条件
  AND o.shop_id = '71008738021cd3393bacbac182bd6a86af0b5c87'
  AND o.channel_id IN ('004', '007', '008', '009', '011', '012', '085')
  AND o.rent_start IS NOT NULL
  AND (o.delete_time <= '2001-01-01 00:00:00' OR o.delete_time IS NULL)
  AND o.status IN ('06', '07', '08', '12')
  AND o.is_violation = '04'
", 'column': 'total_count'}, 'expected_status': 200, 'validate_data': [{'path': "data[?(@.status=='20')].total", 'operator': '==', 'value': '${total_count}'}]}
